text.title: AI-Assisted Coding Protocol for Qualitative Data Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Is corpus size >= 20 AND second coder available?

conclusion.verdict: Use manual coding; protocol overhead not worth it.
Cannot run kappa check; not safe to publish.

branch.when: corpus_size >= 20 AND second_coder_available == true AND kappa_observed >= 0.7
corpus_size >= 20 AND second_coder_available == true AND kappa_observed < 0.7

conclusion.verdict: Revise codebook; bump semver; rerun coding.

example.trace: corpus_size=120 → second_coder=true → kappa=0.78 → publish audit trail.
